positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a lunar landscape under a cosmic night sky. The main subject is a group of stylized, anthropomorphic animals (e.g., a fox, a rabbit, and an owl) standing together on a single, smooth crescent moon silhouette. They are drawn in a charming, graphic, linework style with solid, complementary color fills (deep sapphire, burnt orange, and cream). The composition is central and balanced, emphasizing clean shapes and strong contrast against the deep indigo sky. Use high-contrast vector illustration techniques, incorporating subtle nebulae washes and star trails as background elements. The overall mood is whimsical and serene, suitable for a graphic tee. Cinematic lighting, clean print texture, no gradients on animals, sticker art style.
